notes.fhr_min_nights: FHR has no formal minimum-night requirement; some properties impose their own.
notes.refundability_penalty_pct: 5% of raw_total_usd added to effective when rate is non-refundable. Represents the expected option-value of being able to walk away if plans change.
notes.tiebreaker_threshold_usd: When effective costs are within $5, prefer in this order: refundable, then FHR (perk-stacked), then points, then plain cash. The $5 band absorbs noise.
notes.currency_arb_min_signal_pct: Below 2% delta between query-currency and home-currency totals, don't flag — too noisy after FX spread.
